languages.text: "Из тех ксеносских руин, где сгинул ваш предок. И которые вы велели раскопать. Отступающие оттуда рассказали".
"From the very xenoruins where your ancestor met his end. The same ones you had us dig up. Those who fled the site told us."
languages.original_text: "Из тех ксеносских руин, где сгинул ваш предок. И которые вы велели раскопать. Отступающие оттуда рассказали".

traits.locale_text: "From the very xenoruins where your ancestor met his end. The same ones you had us dig up. We have word from those who fled the site."
"From the very xenoruins where your ancestor met his end. The same ones you had us dig up. We have word from those who fled the site."
"From the very xenoruins where your ancestor met his end. The same ones you had us dig up. Those who fled the site told us."
"From the very xenoruins where your ancestor met his end. The same ones you had us dig up. Those who fled the site told us."

languages.text: “从您那位先祖殒命的异形遗迹里冒出来的，也是您下令让我们挖开的地方。那些逃回来的人是这么说的。”
languages.original_text: "From the very xenoruins where your ancestor met his end. The same ones you had us dig up. Those who fled the site told us."

traits.locale_text: “从您那位先祖殒命的异形遗迹里冒出来的，也是您下令让我们挖开的地方。那些逃回来的人是这么说的。”

languages.text: "Atanızın sonunu getiren zeno harabelerinin ta kendisinden. Bize kazdırdığınızın aynısı. Oradan kaçanlar söyledi."
languages.original_text: "From the very xenoruins where your ancestor met his end. The same ones you had us dig up. Those who fled the site told us."

traits.locale_text: "Atanızın sonunu getiren zeno harabelerinin ta kendisinden. Bize kazdırdığınızın aynısı. Oradan kaçanlar söyledi."

languages.text: « De ces mêmes xénoruines où votre ancêtre a trouvé la mort, celles que vous nous avez demandé de fouiller. C'est ce que nous ont rapporté ceux qui en ont fui. »
languages.original_text: "From the very xenoruins where your ancestor met his end. The same ones you had us dig up. Those who fled the site told us."

traits.locale_text: « De ces mêmes xénoruines où votre ancêtre a trouvé la mort, celles que vous nous avez demandé de fouiller. C'est ce que nous ont rapporté ceux qui en ont fui. »

languages.text: «Desde las mismas xenoruinas en las que su ancestro llegó a su fin. Las mismas que nos hizo excavar. Los que huyeron de allí nos lo han contado».
languages.original_text: "From the very xenoruins where your ancestor met his end. The same ones you had us dig up. Those who fled the site told us."

traits.locale_text: «Desde las mismas xenoruinas en las que su ancestro llegó a su fin. Las mismas que nos hizo excavar. Los que huyeron de allí nos lo han contado».

languages.text: "Aus denselben Xenoruinen, in denen Euer Ahnherr den Tod fand. Den Ruinen, aus denen Ihr uns befreit habt. Den Ruinen, von denen uns die Geflohenen erzählten."
languages.original_text: "From the very xenoruins where your ancestor met his end. The same ones you had us dig up. Those who fled the site told us."

traits.locale_text: "Aus denselben Xenoruinen, in denen Euer Ahnherr den Tod fand. Den Ruinen, aus denen Ihr uns befreit habt. Den Ruinen, von denen uns die Geflohenen erzählten."

languages.text: 「あなたの祖先が命を落とした異星遺跡から。あなたが我々に掘り起こさせた異星遺跡から。その場を逃れた者たちが我々に語った。」
languages.original_text: "From the very xenoruins where your ancestor met his end. The same ones you had us dig up. Those who fled the site told us."

traits.locale_text: 「あなたの祖先が命を落とした異星遺跡から。あなたが我々に掘り起こさせた異星遺跡から。その場を逃れた者たちが我々に語った。」
